llm_eval.notes: py_compile OK. Well decomposed: one check fn per PKG-002..008, clear exit codes (0/1/2). JSONDecodeError caught everywhere, output writes guarded by mkdir(parents,exist_ok); symlink-aware PKG-003 ownership. Minor smells: no-op .replace('PKG-','PKG-') (L382 dead code) and convoluted run_id slice (L357 drops time, keeps date only) reduce uniqueness; no PEP723 frontmatter. Not defects.
